justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's temporal requests throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently reported unavailability and then asked the user to pick a new time without offering any alternatives, which led to a very long conversation.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent's repeated responses of 'I'm sorry, Alex. It looks like [date and time] is not available... Would you like to check other times on [day], or perhaps another day next week?' made the conversation feel very inefficient.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was frustrating due to the agent's inability to proactively offer alternative appointment times, leading to a repetitive and drawn-out interaction.
